case_title: CD ROM DISTRIBUTORS, INC., VS. COYOTE ENTERTAINMENT, INC., et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CD ROM DISTRIBUTORS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COYOTE ENTERTAINMENT, INC. DVD ADVANTAGE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ISSUANCE OF THE NOTICE OF ENTRY ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CD ROM DISTRIBUTORS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CD ROM DISTRIBUTORS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COYOTE ENTERTAINMENT, INC. DVD ADVANTAGE, INC. $100,609.76 PRINCIPAL, $17,593.24 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $118,538.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
